sheet_name: แบบขยายรั้วแบบที่ 1
view_title: แปลน + รูปด้านหน้า + ขยายเสา C1 + ขยายคานคอดิน GB + รูปตัด (รั้วแบบที่ 1)

element.structure_group: รั้วบ้าน แบบที่ 1 (perimeter fence, NOT the main house structural column schedule)
element.spec_source: printed on A-14 detail box 'ขยายเสา C1' 1:20

element.structure_group: รั้วบ้าน แบบที่ 1 (perimeter fence ground tie-beam, คานคอดิน — connects the two C1 posts at grade)

additional_bars.position: เสริมดัดโค้งที่ L/5 (bent bar at L/5)
additional_bars.note: printed as '2-ø9+1ø9 BENT L/5' on the GB cross-section detail — read as 2 straight main bars plus 1 additional bent bar, not 3 straight bars

element.spec_source: printed on A-14 detail box 'ขยายคานคอดิน GB' 1:20

element.structure_group: รั้วบ้าน แบบที่ 1 (perimeter fence footing, under each C1 post)
element.main_bar_note: 3-ø9 (read as 3 bars, 9mm, round/RB per printed Ø symbol) with STR:ø6 @100 ties, shown in the รูปตัด (section) cross-section box under each post
element.spec_source: printed on A-14 section ('รูปตัด') view, footing box labeled 'F'

element.description: เสาเข็ม 2-0.15x0.15x4.00ม (2 precast concrete piles per footing, 0.15x0.15m section, 4.00m length), with DOWEL ø12 ยาว 1.00ม connecting the pile to the footing ('เทคอนกรีตยึดกับเสาเข็ม')

element.material: เหล็ก Ø3/4"x3/4" LG ปลายตัด 45 องศา @ 15 ซม.
element.description: Vertical square-tube fence pickets between C1 posts, spaced 150mm on center, ends cut at 45 degrees (called out twice on the section view, upper and lower zone, same spec both times)
Maximum post-to-post bay spacing 'ระยะไม่เกิน 3.00 ม.' (post spacing not to exceed 3.00m); column setback from bay edge 0.30m (0.15+0.15 split)

Front-elevation ('รูปด้านหน้า') vertical dimension chain, top to bottom: small 0.10/0.10 bands near the top rail/cap, then a 2.00m overall band further broken into 1.35 (upper picket zone) and 0.90/0.40/0.30 (lower zone incl. GB and footing offsets)

warnings: This sheet (A-14) was never extracted in mk_test/t1 or t2 — first-time read.

This is a garden/perimeter fence structural detail sheet, drawn with its own C1 (column), GB (tie beam) and F (footing) marks. These mark LETTERS are commonly also used for the main house's real structural columns/ground-beams/footings in the S-series structural drawings (outside this extraction's page range) — I have NOT cross-checked against those S-series sheets, so treat C1/GB/F here as belonging exclusively to 'รั้วบ้าน แบบที่ 1' (fence type 1), not as evidence about the main house's C1/GB/F specs. Flagged per-element above.

All primary rebar counts/diameters/spacings (4-ø12, STR:ø6@150 for C1; 2-ø9+1ø9 BENT L/5, STR:ø6@150 for GB; 3-ø9, STR:ø6@100 for F) are printed clearly and read at high confidence; per Gen 4 rule 5.4 all 'ø' (plain circle) symbols were read as RB (round bar), never inferred as DB from diameter size.

Sibling sheet A-15 (แบบขยายรั้วแบบที่ 2, หน้า17) shows the same C1 column and F footing specs but a different infill (concrete block instead of steel pickets) and a ทับหลัง (lintel) instead of a GB tie beam — see _หน้า17_fence_type2.json.
Nothing here changes or adds to the main building gridline master file (หน้า00_gridline.json) — no named or dummy grid intersections are referenced on this sheet.
